overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing a character in 18th century Parisian attire walking through cobblestone streets, entering a historic building, ascending a grand staircase, and exploring an ornate library interior. The video transitions from outdoor urban environment to luxurious indoor spaces with detailed period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with revolutionary-era Parisian architecture

events.description: video begins with close-up of a woman, then transitions to third-person perspective following the main character down the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street between historic buildings, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman standing close to camera with blood on her face at the start of the clip
woman in yellow dress walking in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: tall stone buildings with shuttered windows and architectural details lining the left side of the street
tall stone buildings with balconies and hanging flags lining the right side of the street
wet cobblestone pavement with puddles reflecting the overcast sky
French tricolor flag hanging from a building facade
wooden barrels and crates stacked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings in 18th century Paris. French flags hang from the facades, and a few pedestrians in period clothing walk about. The atmosphere is overcast and moody, with wet cobblestones reflecting the grey sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall of a historic mansion with checkered marble floors

events.description: character enters the building from the street, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment
character begins ascending the grand curved staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the large wooden doors into the entrance hall and approaching the grand staircase

entered.detail: large wooden double doors with stone frame that the character walks through to enter the building
black and white checkered marble tile pattern covering the entrance hall floor
sweeping curved staircase with ornate railings leading to the upper floors
white walls with dark trim and gold decorative molding

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand building through large wooden doors into an opulent entrance hall with checkered marble floors. The space features ornate wall paneling and a sweeping curved staircase at the far end. The character walks across the hall and begins ascending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor landing and formal rooms with red carpets and gold trim

events.description: character reaches the top of the staircase and enters the upper floor rooms
lighting becomes warmer as character moves through rooms with red curtains and carpets

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved grand staircase and walking through the ornate upper floor rooms with red carpets and gold-trimmed walls

entered.detail: ornate black wrought iron railing with gold accents along the curved staircase
red carpet runner covering the stairs and upper floor hallways
walls decorated with elaborate gold molding and white panels
large framed oil paintings in ornate gold frames hanging on the walls
crystal chandelier hanging from the ceiling in the upper hall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand curved staircase with ornate railings and red carpet runners, reaching the upper floor. The rooms feature luxurious gold-trimmed walls, large oil paintings, and crystal chandeliers. Natural light filters through tall windows as the character moves through the connected chambers.

scene_state.functional_zone: library hallway with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and large windows

events.description: character enters the long library hallway with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves
character stops at the window to look outside at the city view
character turns to examine the bookshelves and paintings on the wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the library hallway, pausing to look out the window at the city view, and examining the bookshelves and paintings

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelves filled with leather-bound books lining both sides of the hallway
herringbone pattern wooden parquet flooring with red runner carpet
tall multi-paned window at the end of the hallway with iron balcony railing visible outside
large potted plants in white ceramic vases placed between the bookshelves

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long library hallway lined with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes. The space features wooden parquet floors, potted plants, and large windows at the far end. The character walks to the window to look outside, then turns to examine the bookshelves and framed paintings on the walls, exploring the quiet, scholarly environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the moody, overcast streets of 18th-century Paris into the opulent, sunlit interiors of a grand historic estate. It begins by following a character down a narrow cobblestone street lined with stone buildings and French flags under a grey, reflective sky. As the character passes through large wooden doors, the environment shifts abruptly from the damp outdoors to an opulent entrance hall featuring checkered marble floors and ornate wall paneling. The camera then ascends a sweeping curved staircase with red carpet runners, moving through luxurious upper chambers adorned with gold-trimmed walls, oil paintings, and crystal chandeliers. Finally, the scene opens into a quiet, scholarly library hallway lined with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and parquet floors, where the character moves toward large windows before turning to examine the leather-bound volumes and framed art.
